title: Cable Ties Multi Coloured Nylon 50pcs (250 mm × 4.8 mm) 10 Inch NCS35® HIGH VIS Heavy Duty, Self-Locking, UV Resistant, Multi-Purpose Plastic Cable Managment Tie Wraps for Electrical,Nylon Zip Ties
features: Durable & Strong Performance – Made from premium nylon, these HIGH-VIS coloured cable ties (250 mm × 4.8 mm / 10 inch) deliver a minimum tensile strength of 20 kg, ensuring a reliable hold for both everyday and heavy-duty tasks. Ideal for securing electrical wires, computer cables, home DIY projects, and industrial applications where dependable strength is essential.

Versatile Cable Management – Designed to handle a maximum bundle diameter of 65 mm, these self-locking zip ties provide neat, professional organisation. Perfect for tidying up messy computer wires, audio cables, TV leads, charging cords, garden hoses, pipes, and automotive wiring, keeping workspaces and homes clutter-free.

UV High-Vis & Long-Lasting – Manufactured with UV-resistant, high-visibility nylon, these cable ties withstand outdoor exposure without becoming brittle. Suitable for indoor and outdoor cable management, gardening, fencing, greenhouse support, and securing items in warehouses or workshops — making them a must-have for electricians, technicians, and DIY enthusiasts.

Reliable in Extreme Conditions – With a wide working temperature range of –45 °C to +85 °C, these coloured nylon cable ties perform in harsh weather and industrial environments. From freezing cold to hot summer days, they maintain flexibility and strength, ideal for construction sites, outdoor repairs, and automotive maintenance.

Quick & Secure Self-Locking Design – The strong self-locking mechanism ensures fast, tool-free application with no slipping or loosening. Supplied in a pack of 50 pcs, these cable ties are perfect for bundling electrical wire harnesses, organising office cables, securing pipes, fastening bags, camping gear, or DIY repairs a practical solution for home, office, garden, garage, and professional use.
description: Coloured Nylon Cable Ties – 250 mm × 4.8 mm (10 Inch), Pack of 50 | Heavy-Duty, UV High-Vis & Weather Resistant Overview Premium coloured cable ties designed for tough, everyday use. Made from durable nylon with approx. 20 kg tensile strength , these 10 inch zip ties deliver reliable bundling, fastening and organising indoors and outdoors. Key Features High Strength: Robust nylon for long-lasting hold on cables, pipes, hoses and tools. Cable Management: Supports bundles up to 65 mm diameter for tidy wire management at home or work. UV High-Vis & Weatherproof: Resists fading and brittleness in sun, rain and frost. Wide Temp Range: Performs from –45 °C to +85 °C to suit all seasons. Self-Locking Head: Quick, tool-free installation with a secure, anti-slip grip. Sizes & Specs Size: 250 mm × 4.8 mm (approx. 10"). Material: Nylon 66. Colour: Mixed high-visibility colours. Pack Qty: 50 . Single-use, non-releasable. Uses Ideal for electricians , technicians and DIY. Perfect in the home, garden, garage, workshop and office—use for cable management, networking, automotive wiring, fencing, plants, repairs, signage and event rigging. Why These Ties? Strong, visible and dependable for neat installs and quick fixes. A must-have for tool kits and maintenance crews. Keywords: coloured cable ties, nylon zip ties, 250mm x 4.8mm, 10 inch ties, heavy duty cable ties, UV resistant, weatherproof, outdoor cable management, wire tidy, self-locking, mixed colours, multi-purpose pack of 50.
